content.heading: Introduction
content.text: VeteransLedger ('the Archive', 'we', 'our') is committed to transparency about how we collect, use, and protect your information. This Privacy Policy explains our data practices in plain language. By using this site you accept the practices described here.

content.heading: Information We Collect
content.text: We collect only the minimum information needed to operate this site. When you submit our contact form, we receive your name, email address, and message content. We do not require account registration. We do not collect payment information. We do not knowingly collect information from users under the age of 13.

content.heading: Cookies and Local Storage
content.text: This site uses browser cookies and localStorage for the following purposes: (1) Session cookies to maintain navigation state and login sessions for authorised administrators. (2) A localStorage key to remember your theme preference (dark or light mode). (3) A localStorage key to record your cookie consent decision. These are first-party functional cookies and are not used to track your behaviour across other websites.

content.heading: Advertising — Google AdSense
content.text: This site participates in Google AdSense, a third-party advertising programme operated by Google LLC. Google AdSense uses cookies to serve advertisements based on your prior visits to this and other websites. These advertising cookies allow Google and its partners to serve ads to users based on their visit to this site and/or other sites on the Internet. You may opt out of personalised advertising by visiting Google's Ad Settings at https://www.google.com/settings/ads. The use of advertising cookies by Google is governed by Google's Privacy Policy, available at https://policies.google.com/privacy.

content.heading: Analytics
content.text: We may use Google Analytics or similar analytics tools to understand aggregate site usage (pages visited, session duration, referral source). Analytics data is collected anonymously and is not linked to personally identifiable information. No individual user profiles are constructed from analytics data.

content.heading: Third-Party Services
content.text: This site loads web fonts from Google Fonts. Font requests are transmitted to Google's servers; Google's privacy policy applies to those requests. Advertisements served by Google AdSense may cause third-party cookies from Google's advertising partners to be set in your browser. We do not control those third-party cookies; you may manage them through your browser settings or opt-out tools provided by the Network Advertising Initiative (https://optout.networkadvertising.org) or the Digital Advertising Alliance (https://optout.aboutads.info).

content.heading: Contact Form Data
content.text: When you submit a contact or removal request form, your name, email address, and message are transmitted to our administrator email address (VeteransLedger@gmail.com). This information is used solely to respond to your inquiry. We do not sell, share, or otherwise distribute your contact information to third parties. Submitted messages are retained only for as long as is necessary to resolve your inquiry.

content.heading: Data Security
content.text: We implement reasonable technical measures to protect data transmitted to and stored by this site, including HTTPS encryption for all connections. No method of transmission over the Internet is completely secure; while we strive to protect your information, we cannot guarantee absolute security.

content.heading: Your Rights
content.text: Depending on your jurisdiction, you may have rights regarding your personal data, including the right to access, correct, or request deletion of any personal information we hold about you. To exercise any of these rights, contact us at VeteransLedger@gmail.com. We will respond within a reasonable period and in accordance with applicable law.

content.heading: Do Not Track
content.text: Some browsers transmit a 'Do Not Track' signal. We respect this signal where technically feasible. Note that third-party advertisers (such as Google AdSense) have their own policies regarding Do Not Track signals; we cannot control their response to such signals.

content.heading: California Privacy Rights (CCPA)
content.text: California residents have the right to know what personal information we collect, to request deletion of personal information, and to opt out of the sale of personal information. We do not sell personal information. For any CCPA-related requests, contact us at VeteransLedger@gmail.com.

content.heading: European Users (GDPR)
content.text: If you are located in the European Economic Area, our legal basis for processing any personal data you provide (such as through the contact form) is your consent or our legitimate interest in responding to your inquiry. You have the right to withdraw consent at any time. For questions about cross-border data transfers or to exercise your GDPR rights, contact us at VeteransLedger@gmail.com.

content.heading: Changes to This Policy
content.text: We may update this Privacy Policy periodically. The 'Last Updated' date at the top of this page indicates when changes were last made. Continued use of the site after a policy update constitutes acceptance of the revised policy.

content.heading: Contact
content.text: For any privacy-related questions, requests, or concerns, contact us at VeteransLedger@gmail.com.
